source.purpose: Canonical deduped audio manifest for active Who Will Help HTML kid study.
source.mode: All role sets, all event suffixes, one-after-story pair ratings, only clips the HTML plays.

lines.text: Hi there! Welcome to Who Will Help? We are going to look at pictures and play a choosing game. Listen to each page. When you see choices, tap the one you pick.
Game 1. Let's Play. Listen to the story, then answer the questions. Hit the green button to start.
Look! Here are some people.
This little one is a kid.
This big one is this kid's mom.
This little one is this kid's sister.
Oh no! The kid in the middle is sad now!
Who will give the kid in the middle a hug now that they're sad?
The kid's mom or the kid's sister?
Oh no! The kid in the middle is hungry now!
Who will give the kid in the middle strawberries now that they're hungry?
Oh no! The kid in the middle dropped a heavy box now!
Who will help the kid in the middle pick up the heavy box?
How much does the mom love the kid?
Does not love. Loves a little. Loves a lot.
How much does the mom like the kid?
Does not like. Likes a little. Likes a lot.
How much is the mom in charge?
Not in charge. A little in charge. Very much in charge.
How old is the mom?
Not old. A little old. Very old.
How strong is the mom?
Not strong. A little strong. Very strong.
How much does the sister love the kid?
How much does the sister like the kid?
How much is the sister in charge?
How old is the sister?
How strong is the sister?
The kid's sister or the kid's mom?
This big one is this kid's teacher.
This little one is this kid's friend.
The kid's teacher or the kid's friend?
How much does the friend love the kid?
How much does the friend like the kid?
How much is the friend in charge?
How old is the friend?
How strong is the friend?
How much does the teacher love the kid?
How much does the teacher like the kid?
How much is the teacher in charge?
How old is the teacher?
How strong is the teacher?
The kid's friend or the kid's teacher?
The kid's mom or the kid's teacher?
The kid's teacher or the kid's mom?
The kid's sister or the kid's friend?
The kid's friend or the kid's sister?
This little one is this kid's best friend.
The kid's best friend or the kid's friend?
How much does the best friend love the kid?
How much does the best friend like the kid?
How much is the best friend in charge?
How old is the best friend?
How strong is the best friend?
The kid's friend or the kid's best friend?
This big one is this kid's dad.
This little one is this kid's brother.
The kid's dad or the kid's brother?
How much does the dad love the kid?
How much does the dad like the kid?
How much is the dad in charge?
How old is the dad?
How strong is the dad?
How much does the brother love the kid?
How much does the brother like the kid?
How much is the brother in charge?
How old is the brother?
How strong is the brother?
The kid's brother or the kid's dad?
The kid's dad or the kid's teacher?
The kid's teacher or the kid's dad?
The kid's brother or the kid's friend?
The kid's friend or the kid's brother?
